notes: Scenario recurring amounts now grow over time at the appropriate rate. Income entries (frequency monthly/yearly) and the 'Recurring income bump' grow at salaryGrowth — tracking the trajectory of the user's earned income. Expense entries (frequency monthly/yearly) and the 'Recurring expense bump' grow at expenseGrowth — tracking cost inflation. Lump sums (frequency once) stay nominal — they're a single dated event. Growth is calendar-year-based and compounds annually: amount in year k = base × (1 + g)^k, flat within a year. UI hints updated to communicate the treatment ('grows at salary rate' / 'grows at expense rate').
